title: Legal Consultation 法律咨询
scene: 在律师事务所咨询法律问题

lines.en: Please have a seat. What brings you in today?
lines.zh: 请坐。今天您来有什么事？

lines.en: I need some advice about a rental dispute with my landlord.
lines.zh: 我需要一些关于我和房东租赁纠纷的建议。

lines.en: I see. Can you give me more details about the situation?
lines.zh: 明白了。您能告诉我更多细节吗？

lines.en: My landlord is refusing to return my security deposit.
lines.zh: 我的房东拒绝退还我的押金。

lines.en: Did you cause any damage to the property?
lines.zh: 您对房屋造成了什么损坏吗？

lines.en: No, I left the apartment in perfect condition.
lines.zh: 没有，我把公寓保持得很好。

lines.en: Do you have photos of the apartment before you moved out?
lines.zh: 您有搬出去之前的公寓照片吗？

lines.en: Yes, I took pictures of every room.
lines.zh: 有的，我每个房间都拍了照。

lines.en: That's very helpful. We can send a formal demand letter.
lines.zh: 这很有帮助。我们可以发一封正式的催款函。

lines.en: Thank you. What are your fees for this service?
lines.zh: 谢谢。这项服务的费用是多少？
